hero.title: Apply and get a 50% real estate tax discount for 10 years with green building certificates!
hero.description: Green building standards promote the use of renewable and recycled materials, as they have a lower environmental impact.
hero.descriptionBold: Get certified quickly, conveniently and affordably!

section.title: The leading green building certificates are LEED, BREEAM and DGNB
section.subtitle: Gain more advantages for your real estate property

benefits: Reducing environmental impact and preventing climate change
Increased energy efficiency and low operating costs
Increased property value, 50% tax discount and long-term return on investment
Compliance with Latvian legislation on environmental protection and sustainability

conditions.title: Conditions for granting benefits
items: Benefits are granted to newly built or fully renovated buildings commissioned after January 1, 2024.
No need to resubmit an application if the basis or eligibility for benefits has not changed.
Benefits are granted to all building owners if the building meets the eligibility criteria.
The discount is applied for a 10-year period, starting from the month following the building's commissioning and the certificate coming into effect.
The taxpayer must submit an application for benefits by December 15 of the tax year.

hero.title:
Professional building demolition
in Riga and Riga region
hero.description: SIA "NIKA MI" offers demolition services, ensuring deadline compliance and accurate work execution. Apply for a consultation and receive the best solution.

about.title: NIKA MI provides professional demolition services with guaranteed quality and cleanliness
about.subtitle: We calculate costs, create a schedule and perform work within the contractual deadline

type1.title: We perform full demolition
type1.description: From building demolition to construction waste removal and utilization.

type2.title: Client-performed demolition
type2.description: We provide everything needed: equipment, containers, specialist support and work organization.

services.title: Our services:
services.subtitle: We have extensive experience with complex and hazardous objects – we safely demolish old, emergency-state buildings.
items: Full cycle: demolition → crushing → construction waste removal and recycling.
Demolition of various building types – garages, sheds, boiler houses, etc.
Demolition of bunkers and other industrial structures.
Single, two and multi-story building demolition.
Site cleanup after completion of work.
Demolition of wooden, brick, frame buildings (from roof to foundations).
